# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # 48 hours in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 300          # 5 minutes in seconds
      
  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    
  QueueSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref MySQSQueue
      Protocol: sqs
      Topic: !Ref MySNSTopic
      
  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MySQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action:
              - "sqs:SendMessage"
              - "sqs:ReceiveMessage"
              - "sqs:DeleteMessage"
